name: Ria Money Transfer - El Mezquite Check Cashing
description_short: Ria Money Transfer is an international remittance service operating 35+ years, enabling money transfers to 190+ countries through 600,000+ locations worldwide.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer is an established money transfer company with over 35 years of operational history, positioning itself as a trusted provider in the international remittance market. The company has processed over one billion transfers globally, indicating significant scale and operational maturity in the money transfer space.

Ria offers multiple channels for sending money internationally: online via website, through a mobile app, in-person at physical locations, and via WhatsApp messaging. Recipients can receive funds through bank deposits, cash pickup at partner locations, digital wallets, home delivery, or ATM withdrawals. The service covers 190+ countries and territories with support for over 100 currencies. They advertise competitive exchange rates and feature a no-hassle 100% satisfaction guarantee policy.

The company differentiates itself through multi-channel accessibility, particularly its WhatsApp integration for sending money directly from chat, and its extensive agent network of 600,000+ pickup locations worldwide. Ria emphasizes speed of transfers (claiming seconds for delivery initiation) and security, highlighting their billion-transfer track record. They also leverage brand partnerships, such as sponsorship of the Mexican National Team, to build trust and market presence.

While Ria presents competitive advantages in network size and multi-channel delivery, the website provides limited transparency on specific fees beyond a sample 1.99 USD transfer fee to Mexico, exchange rate margins, and regulatory compliance details. Customer reviews on their site are exclusively positive (4.9/5 on iOS, 4.5/5 on Trustpilot), but the company profile provided does not include independent third-party verification or complaint data that would offer balanced assessment.
address: 201 San Pedro Dr SE, Albuquerque, NM 87108

company_info.headquarters: 201 San Pedro Dr SE, Albuquerque, NM 87108

pros: Extensive network of 600,000+ cash pickup locations across 190+ countries
Multiple send methods including online, app, in-person, and WhatsApp integration
Multiple receive options: cash pickup, bank deposit, digital wallet, home delivery, ATM withdrawal
Support for 100+ currencies with real-time rate transparency on website
35+ years of operating history with 1+ billion transfers completed
Fast transfer initiation (claiming seconds for processing)
cons: Limited fee transparency on website—only sample fee of $1.99 shown for Mexico; no clear fee schedule for other corridors
No visible information about exchange rate markups, hidden costs, or comparative pricing data
Positive reviews on company website only (4.5-4.9 stars); no independent third-party complaint data, BBB rating, or regulatory violation history disclosed
Website does not clearly explain regulatory oversight, licensing, or compliance certifications
Lack of information on send limits, processing times, or restrictions by country
best_for: International remitters sending money to family and friends in Mexico, Latin America, Africa, Asia, and Europe
Users seeking cash pickup options who need rapid access to funds at physical locations
Senders preferring multi-channel flexibility (online, app, in-person, WhatsApp)
Businesses and individuals making frequent international transfers seeking a mobile-first platform
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best suited for international remitters seeking convenient, multi-channel money transfer to established corridors with extensive pickup networks (particularly Mexico, Latin America, and Africa). The main caveat is that transparent fee and exchange rate information is limited on their public website, requiring direct engagement with the company for complete cost comparison before committing to transfers.
services: Online money transfer via website with rate calculator
Mobile app-based money transfers with tracking
In-person cash payment at physical agent locations
Cash pickup at 600,000+ partner locations worldwide
Home delivery of funds to recipients
ATM withdrawal access for transferred funds
Transfer tracking and real-time status updates
